g.title: Viewport background, two panel frames, header + footer bands
g.text: KIOSK-006 · SOS alerting (persistent strip + background pulse) · 2026-05-19 · single-design v1a · rev 2 (three-layer basemap)
Lab fixture 800x480 × 2 stacked panels · ADR-015-pending substrate per README.md:36
Panel A — single SOS (tag-2 in distress)
Panel B — multi-SOS (tag-2 + tag-5 both in distress; tag-5 most recent)
Palette: tools/sarcom-kiosk-lab/src/ui/palette.rs · SOS RED fill rgb(160,28,28) per app.rs:245 · TEXT_BRIGHT #c0ccd8 · TEXT_DIM #6c7f92

Source of truth: tickets/KIOSK-006-sos-alerting.md:33 (height unchanged), :42 (text format), :51-54 (most-recent only), :56-64 (NOT in scope) · ADR-007:46 (non-goal: no acknowledgement flow at the gateway; acknowledgement happens at the tag per ADR-010) · Map basemap per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125

g.title: Panel A map area. Three layers (basemap + hillshade + OSM overlays) per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125. tag-2 SOS with pulse ring per markers.rs:216-227.
Sidebar abstracted in Panel A. KIOSK-003 owns row redesign detail.
FULL-WIDTH SOS strip per KIOSK-006:33, 56-64. 800 px × 24 px tall. Text exact per :42. No zones. No coord readout. Background pulse 1.2 s synchronised with marker pulse-ring.
